name: Public Sector IT
description: IT procurement, digitisation projects, and managed services for federal, state, and municipal government bodies, as well as education and defence. Bechtle holds numerous framework contracts and is a strategic supplier for German public administration modernisation under the OZG (Onlinezugangsgesetz) and related programmes.

tam.source: LLM estimate based on Bitkom/EU Digital Decade proxies

sam.scope: German Public Sector IT (where Bechtle holds framework eligibility)
